Container.Name: lootgoblin-courier
Container.Overview:
LootGoblin Courier — a lightweight agent that runs on a box with local access to your 3D printers. It connects OUTBOUND to your central LootGoblin instance, pairs once with a token, and then claims and dispatches print jobs to printers on your LAN (Moonraker / Klipper). No inbound ports are required.
Quick-start: 1. Set COURIER_SERVER_URL to your LootGoblin instance URL. 2. Set COURIER_NAME to a label for this agent (e.g. garage-courier). 3. Generate a pair token in LootGoblin admin > Couriers, paste it into COURIER_PAIR_TOKEN, and start the container. 4. After pairing succeeds, clear COURIER_PAIR_TOKEN and restart.

Config.Name: Config directory
Config.Description: Persistent directory for courier.yml config and courier-state.json (api key). Permissions must allow the container to write.

Config.Name: Server URL
Config.Description: URL of your central LootGoblin instance. Required.

Config.Name: Courier name
Config.Description: Display name for this Courier agent shown in the LootGoblin UI. Required.

Config.Name: Pair token
Config.Description: One-time pairing token generated in LootGoblin admin > Couriers. Only needed on first run. Clear this field after the container has paired successfully.
